title: Gradient-Based Optimizers Path
description: Build fluency in Gradient-Based Optimizers inside Optimization Algorithms by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: SGD (Momentum)
steps.summary: SGD (Momentum) belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after SGD-W and Momentum Optimizer. It opens into Momentum-based SGD and SGD-W & Decoupled Momentum.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Gradient Episodic Memory (GEM)
steps.summary: Gradient Episodic Memory (GEM) belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Gradient and Episodic Memory. It opens into Gradient Episodic Memory (GEM) Extensions and Gradient Episodic Memory (GEM) Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Policy Gradient
steps.summary: Policy Gradient belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Gradient and Policy Function. It opens into Natural Policy Gradient and Policy Gradient Theorem.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: SGD with Momentum
steps.summary: SGD with Momentum belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after SGD-W and Momentum Optimizer. It opens into Momentum-based SGD and SGD-W & Decoupled Momentum.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: gradient-based sampling
steps.summary: gradient-based sampling belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Gradient and sampling. It opens into GOSS (Gradient-based One-Side Sampling) and Gradient-Based One-Side Sampling Theory.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: On-Policy Policy Gradient
steps.summary: On-Policy Policy Gradient belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Gradient and Policy Function. It opens into Natural Policy Gradient and Policy Gradient Theorem.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Policy Gradient Algorithms
steps.summary: Policy Gradient Algorithms belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Gradient and Policy Function. It opens into Natural Policy Gradient and Policy Gradient Theorem.

steps.title: Deterministic Policy Gradient
steps.summary: Deterministic Policy Gradient belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Gradient-Based Optimizers. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Gradient-Based Optimizers. Start after Policy Gradient and On-Policy Policy Gradient. It opens into Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient and Deterministic Policy Gradient (DPG).
